description: Contrastive sensory expression where the second clause limits the first impression.
interpretation_rule: Treat B as a constraint or negative modifier rather than a separate object.

description: Expression that rejects A as the primary frame and prefers B.
interpretation_rule: Prefer B as the stronger axis or object family.

description: Dual descriptor where both properties should remain active.
interpretation_rule: Keep A and B as co-active modifiers.

description: Temporal transition pattern.
interpretation_rule: Map A to opening/top note and B to finish/drydown.

description: Thin diffusion pattern.
interpretation_rule: Treat A as a light-density spreading modifier.

description: Low baseline settling pattern.
interpretation_rule: Map A to density and baseline finish.

description: Wrapping metaphor.
interpretation_rule: Use A as source object and activate wrapping motion.

description: Lingering residual pattern.
interpretation_rule: Map A to finish and lingering confidence.

description: Short finish pattern.
interpretation_rule: Map A to short finish and low persistence.

description: Between-family ambiguity.
interpretation_rule: Keep both families as candidates and reduce overconfident anchor selection.

description: Negative disambiguation.
interpretation_rule: Treat C as negative cue.

description: Comparative dryness.
interpretation_rule: Boost moisture=dry and reduce wet/creamy candidates.

description: Comparative clarity.
interpretation_rule: Boost clarity and precision.

description: Primary/secondary mixture pattern.
interpretation_rule: Treat A as primary and B as secondary modifier.

description: General sensory expression pattern reserved for future parser refinement.
interpretation_rule: Use as a future rule candidate; do not alter parser behavior in v1.2.
